curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. The patch modifies 4 non-test source files: connection.rs, stream.rs, flow_control.rs, and error.rs. The core vulnerability is in flow_control.rs where increase_send_window_by uses checked_add().expect() which panics on u32 overflow when a remote peer sends a WindowUpdate with a large credit value. The patch converts panic-on-overflow to Result-based error handling with a new InvalidWindowUpdate error variant. Primary location is increase_send_window_by in flow_control.rs; the caller on_window_update in connection.rs propagates the overflow without error handling. L1 broadened to cover connection handling generally; L3 narrowed to per-stream send-window flow control. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
